14: Second, this section explains how to utilize Vertex AI RAG capabilities within the
15: Google ADK. The code provided demonstrates the initialization of
16: VertexAiRagMemoryService from the ADK. This allows for establishing a connection to
17: a Google Cloud Vertex AI RAG Corpus. The service is configured by specifying the
18: corpus resource name and optional parameters such as SIMILARITY_TOP_K and
19: VECTOR_DISTANCE_THRESHOLD. These parameters influence the retrieval process.
20: SIMILARITY_TOP_K defines the number of top similar results to be retrieved.
21: VECTOR_DISTANCE_THRESHOLD sets a limit on the semantic distance for the
22: retrieved results. This setup enables agents to perform scalable and persistent
23: semantic knowledge retrieval from the designated RAG Corpus. The process
24: effectively integrates Google Cloud's RAG functionalities into an ADK agent, thereby
25: supporting the development of responses grounded in factual data.
